title: Xucphra (disambiguation)
content:
'''Xucphra''' can refer to:

*'''[[Xucphra Corporation]]''', a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]]-producing company on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]
*'''[[Xucphra City]]''', renamed from Zalxuc City, the city where the company headquarters was located
*Three ships owned by the corporation: ''[[Xucphra Alazhi]]'', ''[[Xucphra Meander]]'', and ''[[Xucphra Rose]]''

{{Disambig}}
